sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102675" key="taxi/wn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τᾰχίων</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τάφρ-ιον</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τάχιστος</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τάφρ-ιστα</orth>, <sense id="n102675.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ταχύς</ref> </xr> c.</sense> </entryFree>
